log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goliath — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goliath — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Goliath — Unarmored Caster HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Goliath — Unarmored Caster HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Goliath — Unarmored Caster HP: 23/67
--- Goliath — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
